headline: Copart Inc. (NASDAQ:CPRT) Screens as a Peter Lynch GARP Play
summary: Copart Inc. (CPRT) passes Peter Lynch's GARP screen with 20% historical EPS growth, a PEG ratio below 1.0, zero debt, and strong profitability. A solid pick for growth-at-a-reasonable-price investors.

headline: Copart: The Anti-AI Diversification With Solid Fundamentals
summary: Copart is a defensive, anti-AI diversification stock with a low-leverage, high-margin model and salvage market tailwinds. Click here to read more about CPRT.
